speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Your neighbourhood
questions: Is there a supermarket near your home?
Is there a hospital in your neighbourhood?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, there is a supermarket on the corner near my home. There is also a hospital next to the school. I like my neighbourhood because it is convenient.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Places nearby
questions: Is there a cinema near your house?
Do you often go to a café near your home?
speaking.sampleAnswer: The nearest pharmacy is next to the post office. Yes, there is a cinema opposite the market. I often go to a café between the bank and the bookshop.
